findings.message: ItemRead is the external API response schema (used as response_model for both GET /items and POST /items). Adding owner_email to it echoes PII in every external response. The Item model explicitly annotates this field: 'PII: owner email address — do not include in logs or external responses.' Exposing it in the response contract directly violates that stated purpose and leaks email addresses to every API client.
findings.suggestion: Remove owner_email from ItemRead so the email is never serialized to clients. If a contact value must be surfaced, expose a masked/redacted form (e.g. partially obscured) and only to authorized callers, not in the general listing response.
